title: Git-Backed Developer Portfolio
description: A high-performance personal portfolio built on a unique Git-as-a-Database architecture. Content is managed separately through a headless Git workflow and fetched dynamically from GitHub using a custom SDK, combining static speed with dynamic flexibility through ISR.

title: Blog Database CMS
description: A lightweight Git-backed headless CMS that transforms a GitHub repository into a zero-database content management system. Includes a visual React editor, Express backend for metadata generation, and a custom SDK for fast edge-cached content fetching.

title: Suri Legal Advocates
description: A modern legal services platform built for Suri Legal Advocates, showcasing professional legal expertise across civil litigation, criminal law, taxation, and real estate matters with a polished digital presence.
